Localization.Description: A user performed an action with a critical group in Zabbix. This could be an attacker's attempt to escalate privileges or make system and network resources unavailable.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} deleted critical group "{object.name}" in Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed critical group "{object.name}" in Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
